area_anchor: Reception re-audit opportunities — fail-closed activity and async integrity gaps
current_truth: Reception re-audit still shows fail-open activity wrappers, unchecked mutation success results, and async fire-and-forget writes that can silently lose audit/financial side effects.
next_scope_now: Harden activity mutation result handling to fail closed, remove fire-and-forget critical writes, and close coverage gaps for non-throwing failure paths.
adjacent_later: Consolidate multi-write financial mutations under shared fail-closed transactional helpers.
Add component-level regression tests for keycard and loans mutation orchestration.
evidence_refs: operator-stated: re-audit reception process and take opportunities forward
why: Critical front-desk flows can report success while activity or financial side effects fail silently, which undermines operator trust and data integrity.

intended_outcome.statement: Reception mutation flows fail closed on non-throwing mutation failures and async side effects are either confirmed or surfaced as explicit errors with regression coverage.
